pre_game.message: Hey there, I'm H. It's a bit of a crowd in here, isn't it? I’m just trying to get my bearings before things start—how are you holding up?
Nice to meet you, H. I'm E. It's definitely a full house, isn't it? I'm doing okay, just trying to stay focused. How are you feeling about everything so far?
I’m a bit anxious but mostly just determined; I’ve got family counting on me, so I’m trying to stay as sharp as possible. What’s driving you to be here?
Pretty much the same thing. I’ve got people I care about back home, and I want to make sure I can provide for them. It’s a lot of pressure, but it keeps me motivated.
I hear you. It’s a lot of weight to carry, but it definitely keeps the goal clear. Hopefully, we can both walk away with what we need.
I hope so too. It’s good to meet someone else who’s focused on more than just themselves here.
Agreed. It helps keep things in perspective when the pressure starts to build.
Exactly. It’s easy to get caught up in the moment, but remembering why we’re doing this makes all the difference.
Definitely. Let’s just hope we can keep that clarity once the money is actually on the table.
That’s the real test, for sure. I'll do my best to stay grounded. Good luck out there, H.
Thanks, E. Good luck to you too, I hope we both get what we need for our families.

post_game.message: Perfect coordination! Glad we all took the fair share.
I'm glad we all took the $10,000 fair share. It's great to see such perfect cooperation!
Agreed, it was a pleasure working with you to achieve this outcome.
